# Anupam Manur

> Professor of Economics at the Takshashila Institution (Bengaluru, India). Research focus: economic policy, trade, platform economics, and bioeconomy. Managing Editor of the Indian Public Policy Review. Co-author of *We, the Citizens*.

## About

Anupam Manur is a Professor of Economics at the Takshashila Institution. He is the Managing Editor of the Indian Public Policy Review (IPPR), a peer-reviewed, open-access journal on Indian public policy. He co-authored *We, the Citizens*, a graphic novel on public policy.

Key areas of expertise:
- Economic policy
- Trade policy
- Platform economics
- Bioeconomy

## Pages

- [Home](https://anupammanur.com/): Overview and recent writings
- [Blog](https://anupammanur.com/blog/): Long-form analysis and commentary
- [Op-eds](https://anupammanur.com/op-eds/): Published opinion pieces
- [Publications](https://anupammanur.com/publications/): Academic papers, policy briefs, and research reports
- [Books](https://anupammanur.com/books.html): Co-authored books
- [Media](https://anupammanur.com/media.html): Select videos and podcast appearances
- [Courses](https://anupammanur.com/courses.html): Courses taught at Takshashila Institution
- [IPPR](https://anupammanur.com/ippr.html): Indian Public Policy Review
